cases.description: Should trigger: audit page for accessibility
cases.input: Audit my React dashboard component for accessibility issues
cases.expect: WCAG 2.2 AA audit with violations, severity, fix code for each

cases.input: Is my signup form WCAG AA compliant?
cases.expect: Checks labels, error handling, focus order, contrast, ARIA

cases.input: Make sure my modal dialog works with keyboard navigation
cases.expect: Focus trap, Esc to close, Tab order within modal, aria-modal

cases.input: Check if my color scheme meets accessibility contrast requirements
cases.expect: Compute contrast ratios, reference WCAG SC 1.4.3, suggest color adjustments

cases.input: Will my e-commerce checkout flow work with screen readers?
cases.expect: Landmarks, headings, aria-live regions, form labels, error announcements

cases.description: Should trigger: ADA compliance for Vue app
cases.input: I need to make my Vue.js admin panel ADA compliant before launch
cases.expect: Vue-specific patterns, semantic HTML, ARIA, keyboard support

cases.description: Should NOT trigger: general UI design question
cases.input: What's a good color palette for a fintech dashboard?
My React app is rendering slowly. How can I optimize it?
